creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
The page at http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/pc98.html makes no mention
of the fact that pc98 is regarded as a Tier-1 platform, whereas most of the other
platforms do mention their status.  Also add an "Introduction" header, to better
fit with the other platform specific pages.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
